doc.body:
// 模拟react的运行环境 fiber与组件一一对应
const fiber = {
  stateNode: App,
  memoizedState: null,//以链表形成保存state的值
}

//判断是首次渲染还是更新
let isMounted = true;
//指针 指向当前处理的hook
let workInProgressHook = null;

// 接受一个初始化的initialState 并返回一个改变状态的方法
function useState(initialState) {
  // 定义变量 判断是哪个useState()调用
  let hook;
  /* 
  *  先判断是首次渲染还是再次更新
  *  为什么要进行判断区分呢？ 
  *  因为首次渲染时fiber中的memoizedState还是null 没有对应的 state值
  */
  if (isMounted) {
    /* 
    *  首页渲染 初始化hook
    *  memoizedState 对应的就是每个state的值 
    *  eg: const [num, setNum] = useState(0); memoizedState 等于num的值
    *  next 指向下一个hook
    *  queue 新状态的队列
    */
    hook = {
      memoizedState: initialState,
      next: null,
      queue: {
        pending: null,
      }
    }
    if (!fiber.memoizedState) {
      fiber.memoizedState = hook;
    } else {
      /* 
      存在多个useState()调用时
        eg: const [num, setNum] = useState(0);
        const [age, setAge] = useState(18);
        const [sex, setSex] = useState('m');
      此时hook已经创建workInProgressHook 指向不同的hook
      */
      workInProgressHook.next = hook;
    }
    workInProgressHook = hook;
  } else {
    // 更新时 查询已建立的链表
    hook = workInProgressHook;
    workInProgressHook = workInProgressHook.next;
  }
  let baseState = hook.memoizedState;
  if (hook.queue.pending) {
    let firstUpdater = hook.queue.pending.next;
    do {
      const action = firstUpdater.action;
      baseState = action(baseState);
      firstUpdater = firstUpdater.next;
    } while (firstUpdater !== hook.queue.pending.next)
    hook.queue.pending = null;
  }
  hook.memoizedState = baseState
  return [baseState, dispatchAction.bind(null, hook.queue)];
}

// 更新state的方法
// queue需要更新的值的指向， action执行方法
function dispatchAction(queue, action) {
  /* 定义一个链表 查询是哪个函数调用 */
  const update = {
    action,
    next: null,
  }
  //环状链表
  if (queue.pending == null) {
    update.next = update
  } else {
    update.next = queue.pending.next
    queue.pending.next = update
  }
  queue.pending = update
  schedule()
}

//调用方法更新状态 调度器
function schedule() {
  //每次更新 重新指向第一个hook 复位指向 统一指向第一个
  workInProgressHook = fiber.memoizedState;
  //每更新一次状态需要重新render即重新调度
  const app = fiber.stateNode()
  //非首此调用isMounted置为false
  isMounted = false;
  return app;
}

function App() {
  const [num, setNum] = useState(0);
  console.log('num', num)
  return {
    onC() {
      setNum(num => num + 1);
    }
  }
}
//挂载到全局
window.app = schedule();
doc.body_draft:
Hook源码

​导出多有hooks的文件 /packages/react/src/React.js

import {
  getCacheForType,
  useCallback,
  useContext,
  useEffect,
  useImperativeHandle,
  useDebugValue,
  useLayoutEffect,
  useMemo,
  useMutableSource,
  useReducer,
  useRef,
  useState,
  useTransition,
  useDeferredValue,
  useOpaqueIdentifier,
  useCacheRefresh,
} from './ReactHooks';


export {
  ...
  useCallback,
  useContext,
  useEffect,
  useImperativeHandle,
  useDebugValue,
  useLayoutEffect,
  useMemo,
  useMutableSource,
  useReducer,
  useRef,
  useState,
  ...
}

有一些我们很常用有些可能你闻所未闻，若想知道他们都是什么作用只能去啃源码了


手写简易useState

卡颂视频

// 模拟react的运行环境 fiber与组件一一对应
const fiber = {
  stateNode: App,
  memoizedState: null,//以链表形成保存state的值
}

//判断是首次渲染还是更新
let isMounted = true;
//指针 指向当前处理的hook
let workInProgressHook = null;

// 接受一个初始化的initialState 并返回一个改变状态的方法
function useState(initialState) {
  // 定义变量 判断是哪个useState()调用
  let hook;
  /* 
  *  先判断是首次渲染还是再次更新
  *  为什么要进行判断区分呢？ 
  *  因为首次渲染时fiber中的memoizedState还是null 没有对应的 state值
  */
  if (isMounted) {
    /* 
    *  首页渲染 初始化hook
    *  memoizedState 对应的就是每个state的值 
    *  eg: const [num, setNum] = useState(0); memoizedState 等于num的值
    *  next 指向下一个hook
    *  queue 新状态的队列
    */
    hook = {
      memoizedState: initialState,
      next: null,
      queue: {
        pending: null,
      }
    }
    if (!fiber.memoizedState) {
      fiber.memoizedState = hook;
    } else {
      /* 
      存在多个useState()调用时
        eg: const [num, setNum] = useState(0);
        const [age, setAge] = useState(18);
        const [sex, setSex] = useState('m');
      此时hook已经创建workInProgressHook 指向不同的hook
      */
      workInProgressHook.next = hook;
    }
    workInProgressHook = hook;
  } else {
    // 更新时 查询已建立的链表
    hook = workInProgressHook;
    workInProgressHook = workInProgressHook.next;
  }
  let baseState = hook.memoizedState;
  if (hook.queue.pending) {
    let firstUpdater = hook.queue.pending.next;
    do {
      const action = firstUpdater.action;
      baseState = action(baseState);
      firstUpdater = firstUpdater.next;
    } while (firstUpdater !== hook.queue.pending.next)
    hook.queue.pending = null;
  }
  hook.memoizedState = baseState
  return [baseState, dispatchAction.bind(null, hook.queue)];
}

// 更新state的方法
// queue需要更新的值的指向， action执行方法
function dispatchAction(queue, action) {
  /* 定义一个链表 查询是哪个函数调用 */
  const update = {
    action,
    next: null,
  }
  //环状链表
  if (queue.pending == null) {
    update.next = update
  } else {
    update.next = queue.pending.next
    queue.pending.next = update
  }
  queue.pending = update
  schedule()
}

//调用方法更新状态 调度器
function schedule() {
  //每次更新 重新指向第一个hook 复位指向 统一指向第一个
  workInProgressHook = fiber.memoizedState;
  //每更新一次状态需要重新render即重新调度
  const app = fiber.stateNode()
  //非首此调用isMounted置为false
  isMounted = false;
  return app;
}

function App() {
  const [num, setNum] = useState(0);
  console.log('num', num)
  return {
    onC() {
      setNum(num => num + 1);
    }
  }
}
//挂载到全局
window.app = schedule();
